name: Exclusion of Blocked Foreign Income

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must establish to the satisfaction of the Secretary that foreign law restrictions or currency limitations prevent the distribution of CFC earnings.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Earnings and profits of a controlled foreign corporation (CFC) are excluded from Subpart F and Section 956 inclusions if currency or other legal restrictions in a foreign country prevent the distribution of such income to U.S. shareholders.
